caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a conference room or lecture hall. Three individuals are seated at individual tables, each equipped with microphones and water bottles, suggesting a formal setting for a talk or debate. The person on the left, dressed in dark attire, appears to be speaking animatedly, using hand gestures to emphasize points. The person in the center, wearing a black jacket over a red top, listens attentively, while the person on the right, in a patterned shirt, seems to be adjusting their microphone or preparing to speak. A banner in the background promotes interaction between science, practice, and healthcare questions, indicating the theme of the discussion. The audience is not visible, but the setup suggests an organized event aimed at engaging participants in a structured conversation.
